posts.author: ClayPottersDunmere
posts.text:
Just dropped off the new kiln firing schedule for the Westbridge Ceramic Circle meetup next Tuesday! 5:30pm at the old factory entrance. Bring your own gloves if you want to help load the racks.

#Community #Ceramics
posts.explanation: This post is an ordinary community event announcement with no harmful content, private details or calls to action.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.
